name: Megan Scott
about: 4 years at luxury department stores Saks Fifth Avenue and Neiman Marcus. Strong styling skills across designers. New to Reflex and seeking flexible opportunities.
interviewTranscript: I've spent four years at luxury department stores where you have to know dozens of designers inside and out. At Saks and Neiman Marcus, the expectation is that you can style across the entire floor—mix a Veronica Beard blazer with Isabel Marant jeans and Golden Goose sneakers. That versatility is my strength. I'm new to Reflex and looking for flexibility while I explore my next chapter.
